summary: Emit a stderr warning and reword `--help` when `--code` is set in `insider-cluster`.
reason: The v1 implementation does not apply transaction-code filtering (would require per-filing Form 4 XML fetching). Previously the flag was silently ignored with only a buried note in the meta output; now it warns on stderr and the `--help` text states 'NOT APPLIED in v1' unambiguously.
